_comment: Hand-edit this file as the tournament unfolds. Key = match id from fixtures.json, value = [homeGoals, awayGoals]. Anything not listed here is treated as not-yet-played and gets simulated. Example: "GE1": [3, 0]. KNOCKOUT MATCHES decided on penalties (level after extra time): add the shootout winner as a 3rd element, e.g. "R32-1": [1, 1, "BRA"] or [1, 1, "H"] / [1, 1, "A"]. The winner token is only needed for level scores; a decisive score like [2,1] needs no token.
